message: Jake
Cindy
Gloria
So you were here.
What are you doing here?
No one is coming back here anymore.
Still, you shouldn't be here!
But, I
want to
see
talk
listen
think
move
System
about the situation
related　to
any hints about the culprit
the　matter

end the game
The lifeless room resembles a hotel room after a guest has checked out.
A heavy leather sofa sits in the center of the room, and one wall is entirely made of windows. It's definitely not a place a teenage girl would own.
I know her well enough to realize this room doesn’t suit her at all.
It’s someone I cared for like a daughter or sister,
but I can’t say that the other person understood that.
Losing a work partner at the same time.
Even from an outsider’s perspective, I can gauge the depth of that sorrow. I want to comfort her somehow,
yet from the depth of her troubled expression,
it seems she's mourning her death more than just as an actress and her agent.
I haven't slept much since I heard the news of the death.
Shindey
I heard he was still alive when they amputated his left leg.
amputation while still alive
It must have hurt incredibly,
why did that kid have to go through such a terrible thing?
Horrible.
It's too horrible.
You'll never find another talent like that kid.
I can't think about anything anymore. That kid was everything to me.
Still, you have to keep living.
I know that,
but I loved her. It won't be easy to recover.
I don't want to do anything anymore.
I don't want to see anyone.
When was the last time you saw him?
The last time I saw him was at FLIX. It's hard to believe that was the last time we parted.
I can't stop regretting it.
Was that the last time?
Yes! If you hadn't interrupted then,
by now,
he might still be alive.
Don't get emotional. Depending on you,
we might catch the killer.
What good would that do? That kid isn't coming back!
It might prevent more victims. You're not the only one who's grieving.
Yeah.
Yeah, you're right. I'm sorry.
It's okay, anyone can lose their composure. Has anything changed at FLIX?
What do you mean by changed?
What kind?
For example, feeling like someone is watching you or like you're being followed.
I don't know.
I don't think that was the case, though.
I don't think anything particularly unusual happened at FLIX.
I don't know, there's no way I could know something like that.
You're saying you have a lead on the culprit?
Things like that.
Unlike me, that kid never did anything to make people resent her.
So, you mean she was killed not out of revenge?
According to the police, they think it was the perpetrator of that serial murder case.
To slice up a person while they're alive?
That's truly an unforgivable criminal.
Surprisingly, you're not panicking.
It's too late for that.
It's no use getting worked up. Or are you saying getting worked up
will bring him back?
There's no way that child would do anything to be hated by others.
Looks like she hasn't slept a wink, completely worn out.
Seeing her tragic expression, it's clear that for her,
he wasn't just a business partner.
I don't know if I can regain my former life, or if I'll spend my life crying over Cindy.
I can only pray that the incident gets resolved quickly and that the day comes when she can forget everything.
She was kidnapped and confined without ever getting to see her mother again, and ended up being killed.
Is there really anyone who benefits from killing? Like a work rival or someone in a financial conflict?
Who killed her, and for what purpose did they murder her?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
